reviews.text: Perfect morning breakfast at this corner cafeteria.
reviews.name: Gerald Muriel (Temiatwork)

reviews.text: This is our favorite tea shop. We love it. We go once a week. The place is very nice, the food is delicious and the people are very helpful and joyful. The kids are always so happy and ask to go back!
reviews.name: Clémence de Laroussilhe Lacaze

reviews.text: Great service and all experience. They are open on Sunday contrary to the kantine in the museum.
reviews.name: Agnieszka Ciepiela

reviews.text: Friendly personnel. Good fresh juices
reviews.name: Francois Sakellaridis

reviews.text: Very nice and reasonable prices
reviews.name: Lilja Steinunn

reviews.text: Fabulous
reviews.name: John Marden

reviews.textTranslated: Pastry shop, bakery, and café with seating and a terrace. Open Sundays. Cappuccino with lactose-free milk! Smiling and helpful staff.
reviews.text: Pasticceria, panetteria, caffetteria con tavoli sul posto e terrazza. Aperto la domenica. Cappuccino con latte senza lattosio! Personale sorridente e disponibile
reviews.name: Samantha

reviews.textTranslated: Good breakfast, excellent service, very friendly and welcoming staff, especially the new employee and the rather young blonde lady
reviews.text: Bon petit déjeuner service très bien employées très souriantes et accueillantes surtout la nouvelle et la dame blonde assez jeune
reviews.name: Marie Manzella

reviews.textTranslated:
Everything was delicious and open on Sundays too!!!
Very welcoming
reviews.text:
Riquísimo todo y abierto en domingo también!!!
Muy acogedor
reviews.name: Daniel Hansen

reviews.textTranslated: Great place to eat a walrus for lunch
reviews.text: Super sympa pour manger une morse à midi
reviews.name: Louise Demierre

title: Les Petits Plaisirs
address: en face de la poste des, Pass. Linck 4, 1207 Genève, Switzerland
street: en face de la poste des, Pass. Linck 4

reviews.text:
Incredible croissants aux amandes, amazing pains au chocolat and the pastries are delightful !
Best bakery in Geneva and the owner is dedicated and kind.
reviews.name: Veronika Kalouguina

reviews.text: Best pain au choc anywhere - not just Geneva but anywhere.
reviews.name: Aloysius Kalivoda

reviews.textTranslated:
Delicious products made with quality local ingredients. It makes all the difference!
They're a real treat. Try them and you'll love them.
The opposite of mass-produced or semi-industrial.
reviews.text:
Des produits délicieux faits à base de bons produits locaux. Ça fait la différence !
On se régale. L'essayer c'est l'adopter.
L'opposé de l'industriel et semi-industriel.
reviews.name: Laurent Godel

reviews.textTranslated: Simply the best in the neighborhood! One of the last artisans to still make their own products. The brioche is to die for, and the service is always friendly.
reviews.text: Juste la meilleure du quartier! Un des derniers artisans à fabriquer ses produits. La brioche est à tomber, l accueil toujours sympathique.
reviews.name: Thomas Dechevrens

reviews.textTranslated:
Today, I had some very soft bugs and the orange juice was a real treat, not at all acidic. Everything there is handmade.
This tea room is located right next to the Eaux-Vives post office. It's not the first time I've been there and I've never been disappointed. If you have a sweet tooth, I recommend it 100%.
reviews.text:
AUJOURD'HUI ,J AI PRIS DES BUGUES TRES MOELLEUSES ET LE JUS D' ORANGE UN VRAI DELICE PAS DU TOUT ACIDE.TOUS Y EST FAIT
ARTISANALEMENT.
CE THÉ - ROOM SE TROUVE JUSTE À CÔTÉ DE LA POSTE DES EAUX VIVES .CE N EST PAS LA 1ER FOIS QUE J 'Y VAIS ET JAMAIS DÉÇU, SI VOUS ÊTES GOURMAND (E) ET BIEN JE VOUS LE RECOMMANDE À 100%.
reviews.name: F Z

reviews.textTranslated: A wonderful discovery of this artisanal bakery and chocolate shop. A warm welcome and quality products.
reviews.text: Belle découverte de cette boulangerie chocolaterie artisanale. Bel accueil et produits de qualité
reviews.name: Nazik El Mahjoubi

reviews.textTranslated: Super little artisanal tea room and pastry shop right across from the post office. Yum!
reviews.text: Super petit tea room pâtisserie A R T I S A N A L E juste en face de la poste MIAM
reviews.name: Catherine Kunz

reviews.textTranslated: Excellent products… and fair prices! The ham croissant is to die for… the brioche is divine, and there are so many other treats to discover!
reviews.text:
Très bon produits … et prix correct
Croissant au jambon à tomber..
brioche de rêve et tellement d’autres douceurs à découvrir
reviews.name: Olivier Bernasconi

reviews.textTranslated: The best croissants, pains chocolat, and almond croissants in Geneva, without a doubt. The owner is passionate and always friendly!
reviews.text: Meilleurs croissants, pains chocolat et croissants aux amandes de Geneve, sans aucun doute. Patron passionne et toujours sympa!
reviews.name: Sophie Soso

reviews.textTranslated: The best pastries in the world! Finally, a truly artisanal pastry shop. We love it!
reviews.text: Les meilleures carac du monde ! Enfin une pâtisserie vraiment artisanale. On adore !
reviews.name: Sabine Rochette

reviews.text: Everything is so good!! The baked goods are really something. Just be aware that they don’t accept cards as far as I know (or until a certain amount), so bring cash.
reviews.name: Nadya Fraidoon

reviews.textTranslated: Adorable little neighborhood bakery. The quality is excellent and the service is very friendly. Special mention for the quiches and the sugar brioche with a hint of orange blossom! 🙂
reviews.text: Adorable petite boulangerie de quartier. La qualité est au rendez-vous et l’accueil est très sympathique. Mention spéciale pour les quiches et la brioche au sucre avec un soupçon de fleur d’oranger! 🙂
reviews.name: Achille vilon

reviews.textTranslated: I love coming to this bakery near my home that offers delicious homemade products! The quiches, tarts, and pastries are excellent, and the prices are reasonable for Geneva. Thanks again! 🌟
reviews.text: J’adore venir dans cette boulangerie proche de chez moi qui propose des produits faits maison et très bons ! Les quiches, tartes et viennoiseries sont très bonnes et les prix sont abordables pour Genève. Encore merci 🌟
reviews.name: Mathilde Martel

reviews.textTranslated:
Great little bakery with truly delicious products! Super friendly family!

We highly recommend it!
reviews.text:
Super petite boulangerie avec de vrai produit délicieux ! Famille super sympa !
Nous recommandons !
reviews.name: Muriel matti

reviews.textTranslated:
A warm welcome.
Wonderful almond croissants.
A brief moment of pure bliss.
reviews.text:
Un excellent accueil.
Des croissants aux amandes merveilleux.
Un petit moment de pur bonheur.
reviews.name: Georges Etienne

reviews.textTranslated: One of the few genuine bakeries and pastry shops in Geneva. Good mood or bad, it seems the customer sets the tone. To hell with the complainers! 🤣
reviews.text: Une des rares véritables boulangerie-patisserie de Genève. Bonne ou mauvaise humeur à priori c'est le client qui donne le ton. Au diable les râleurs 🤣
reviews.name: Luc Deschenaux

reviews.textTranslated:
The team is very friendly and welcoming!
The quiches are delicious, and I love your ham croissants 😋.
reviews.text:
Equipe très souriante et agréable !
Les quiches sont bien bonnes et j'adore vos croissants au jambon😋.
reviews.name: lolo 74

reviews.textTranslated: Excellent, very good artisanal products, very friendly owner and staff
reviews.text: Excellent, produits artisanaux  très bons patron et personnel très sympa
reviews.name: A.F De C. Couto

reviews.textTranslated: Exceptionally warm welcome, excellent homemade products, and a wide variety of extra-fresh salads to take away or eat in.
reviews.text: Accueil chaleureux exceptionnel, excellents produits tous fait-maison, salades variées extra fraîches à emporter ou à  consommer sur place
reviews.name: Fran Loz

reviews.textTranslated: A lovely little pastry shop with excellent service. You can eat inside or outside. The pastries are homemade by the owner's husband.
reviews.text: Jolie petite pâtisserie avec très bon service. Possibilités de manger à l'intérieur ou dehors. Les pâtisseries sont faites maison par le mari de la gérante.
reviews.name: Fred M

title: HELLO SISTA
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Confirmed by this business 10 weeks ago

reviews.text: Super!
reviews.name: Katrien Verdonck

reviews.textTranslated: A place where you feel good and never want to leave! Justine takes excellent care of her customers, and her joy and good humor are contagious. Her delicious dishes and desserts are always made with love. A superb address in Carouge that deserves to be known...
reviews.text: Lieu de vie ou on se sent bien , et où ou n a pas envie de repartir! Justine est aux petits soins pour ses clients , sa joie et sa bonne humeur demeurent contagieuses . Ses bons petits plats et ses desserts sont toujours faits avec amour . Une superbe adresse à Carouge qui mérite d être connue. ..
reviews.name: Laure De Ruvo

reviews.textTranslated:
My favorite place 🌼
It's so welcoming, the atmosphere is warm and friendly.
The homemade products are delicious and prepared with care. The chai is excellent :)
An authentic and welcoming spot! ❤️
reviews.text:
Mon lieu favoris 🌼
On s’y sent vraiment bien, l’ambiance est chaleureuse et humaine.
Les produits fait maison sont délicieux et préparés avec soin. Très bon Chaï :)
Une adresse authentique et accueillante ! ❤️
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your kind words, they truly touched us. It's true, at HELLO SISTA everything is homemade and made with love 🫶
reviews.name: Alessia Lamenta

reviews.textTranslated:
What a delight!
Words can't do justice to the experience, but I simply must try. A truly welcoming place, the atmosphere is warm and friendly. They offer a variety of workshops, showcase the work of different artists, have an organic grocery store, and serve high-quality food. Eclecticism in a gentle setting. It has everything.
A place you absolutely must discover; I can't wait to go back.
Highly recommended.
reviews.text:
Quel plaisir !
Les mots ne seront pas à la hauteur de l'expérience, mais je me dois d'essayer. Lieu fédérateur, l'accueil y est chaleureux et bienveillant. Proposition de multiples ateliers, mise en avant d'œuvres de différents artistes, épicerie bio, restauration de grande qualité. L'éclectisme dans un bain de douceur. Tout y est.
Un lieu à découvrir absolument, il me tarde d'y revenir.
Je recommande chaudement.
reviews.name: Olivier cuvelier

reviews.textTranslated:
🌿 A real gem! 🌿 I highly recommend this organic grocery store! The atmosphere is warm and welcoming, and you can feel Justine's genuine passion behind her smile. The products are high-quality, local, and organic, carefully selected.

Special mention goes to the food section: everything is homemade, with fresh, organic ingredients, and cooked with love.
A must-visit for those who want to support an eco-friendly approach and treat themselves.
Well done to Justine, always ready to make us happy! 👏🌱
reviews.text:
🌿 Un véritable coup de cœur ! 🌿
Je recommande cette épicerie bio ! L’ambiance est chaleureuse et on sent une vraie passion derrière le sourire de Justine. Les produits sont de grande qualité, locaux et bio, soigneusement sélectionnés.
Mention spéciale pour la partie restauration : tout est fait maison, avec des ingrédients frais, bio, et cuisinés avec amour.
Une adresse incontournable pour celles et ceux qui veulent soutenir une démarche écoresponsable, et se faire plaisir.
Bravo à Justine toujours prête à nous faire plaisir ! 👏🌱
reviews.name: Valérie CAILLE

reviews.textTranslated:
Great place in Geneva.

I went there for a training course.

The place is very cozy and welcoming.

The owner is very friendly and helpful.

She prepared a delicious homemade meal for us.

If you're looking for a nice little shop to have a coffee or a training venue, you can go there without hesitation!
Thank you to Justine for the warm welcome and the meal.
reviews.text:
Super endroit à Genève.
Je m'y suis rendue dans le cadre d'une formation.
Le lieu est très chzleureux et accueillant.
La propriétaire est très sympathique et serviable.
Elle nous a préparé un super repas maison.
Si vous cherchez une petite boutique, sympa pour boire un café ou un lieu de formation, vous pouvez y aller les yeux fermer !
Merci à Justine pour l'accueil et le repas.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for being here, I was delighted to welcome you today, it was a pleasure for both of us 😉
reviews.name: Maud Grand

reviews.textTranslated: Great spot for a coffee and a slice of cake. I stumbled upon it with my little girl after splashing around in the fountain across the street. The cakes and apricot crumble were excellent. The terrace is beautifully decorated and has a peaceful atmosphere. There's even a small play table for children – a nice touch!
reviews.text: Super endroit pour prendre un café et consommer un gâteau. Je m'y suis rendu avec ma petite fille un peu par hasard après être allé faire trempette à la fontaine d'en face. Les cake et le crumble aux abricots étaient excellents. Et la terrasse est bien décorée ça respire la paix. Petite table de jeu pour les enfants, bravo:)
reviews.name: Señor Doudouño

reviews.textTranslated: A great place to chill, grab a bite to eat, or enjoy organic products in the gourmet grocery section, or buy handmade items. Justine is fully committed to her coffee shop concept, which emphasizes human values. We love it!
reviews.text: Super endroit pour chiller, se restaurer ou profiter de produits bio avec la partie épicerie fine ou acheter des articles hand-made. Justine se donne à fond pour son concept-coffee-store aux valeurs humaines mises en avant. On aime !
reviews.name: Olivier REY

reviews.textTranslated: I received a very warm welcome from a smiling and friendly lady, which was a real pleasure. The service was friendly and the quiches were excellent. I recommend this establishment without hesitation!
reviews.text: J’ai été très bien accueilli par une dame souriante et chaleureuse, ce qui fait vraiment plaisir. L’accueil est convivial et les quiches sont excellentes. Je recommande cet établissement sans hésitation !
reviews.name: Comptes

reviews.textTranslated: This place is fantastic, and the owner is incredibly kind and attentive to her customers. We were lucky enough to spend a day there during a training course, and we had a wonderful time, not to mention the delicious food. Many thanks to Justine!
reviews.text: Cet endroit est super chouette en plus d'avoir une patronne très gentille et au petit soin pour ces clients. Nous avons eu la chance de faire une journée sur place lors d'une formation et nous avons passés une très bonne journée en plus d'avoir bien mangés. Merci beaucoup à Justine !
reviews.name: Ju

peopleAlsoSearch.title: Salon de thé La Brioche Dorée

title: Signature Café
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by this business 3 weeks ago

reviews.textTranslated: Great cafe, the cappuccinos are wonderful, there are fresh juices made to order, and day-old baked goods are sold at low prices, helpful staff, terrace, I come regularly.
reviews.text: Super café, les cappucino sont magnifiques, il y a des jus frais minute, et des produits de boulangerie de la veille sont vendus à petits prix, personnel serviable, terrasse, je viens régulièrement.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your comment and see you soon!!!🍮🧁
reviews.name: Valérie C.

reviews.textTranslated: Quiet and very fast service, thank you again!
reviews.text: Calme et service très rapide, merci encore !
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you very much and see you soon.
reviews.name: Jeffrey Zenhausern (CH5)

reviews.textTranslated: Friendly and professional saleswoman-waitress.
reviews.text: Vendeuse-serveuse sympathique et professionnelle.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much!
reviews.name: Lucia DS

reviews.textTranslated: Perfect!
reviews.text: Τέλειο !
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: THANKS

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much!

reviews.responseFromOwnerText: THANKS

peopleAlsoSearch.title: La Bergamote Genève - Salon de thé

reviews.text: Very pleasant servers and good coffee.
reviews.name: Eva P

reviews.textTranslated:
We love the fresh homemade fruit juices and pastries!

The raisin bread is to die for!
reviews.text:
On adore les jus de fruits frais maison et les viennoiseries !

Les pains au raisin sont à tomber !
reviews.name: Shei Razad

reviews.textTranslated: High-quality, homemade products. Their bread is excellent. Friendly and professional staff. I highly recommend them!
reviews.text: Produits de qualité et maison. Leur pain est excellent. Personnel avenant et professionnel. Je recommande vivement !
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Hello, thank you so much for your kind feedback. Looking forward to seeing you again :)
reviews.name: Bistro Coco

reviews.textTranslated: Great experience this morning with a very kind lady who gave me milk for my coffee when I'd forgotten it. Very good pain au chocolat. I'll be back.
reviews.text: Super experience ce matin avec une très gentille dame qui m'a donné du lait pour mon café lorsque je l'avais oublié. Très bon pain au chocolat. Je reviendrais.
reviews.name: Paul Gerhard

reviews.textTranslated: A very warm welcome, excellent sandwiches and desserts. We used a small space for a meeting of our association. The place is very pleasant. I recommend it!
reviews.text: Très bon accueil, excellents sandwichs et desserts. Nous avons utilisé un petit espace pour une rencontre de notre association. Le lieu est très agréable. Je recommande!

reviewContext.Kid-friendliness: Tea room familial, accueil chaleureux, boissons et de quoi goûter

reviews.name: Stéphanie Fischer

reviews.textTranslated: There are Swiss pastries, and then there are the pastries from Rendez-vous Gourmand. They're not just two separate worlds, but two galaxies.
reviews.text: Il y a les pâtisseries suisses, et il y a les pâtisseries de Rendez-vous Gourmand. Ce ne sont pas 2 mondes à part, mais 2 galaxies
reviews.name: Etienne Bateau

reviews.textTranslated: Very good, I recommend it!!!
reviews.text: Très bon, je recommande !!!
reviews.name: مُحَمَّدٍ الواتي

reviews.textTranslated: The chicken traveler's sandwich was very good. I was warmly welcomed and served.
reviews.text: Le sandwich voyageur au poulet était très bon. J’ai été bien accueilli et servi.

reviewContext.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Paid street parking

reviews.name: Breathtaking

reviews.textTranslated: Very pleasant and professional welcome. The pastries are excellent, I recommend this bakery.
reviews.text: Accueil très agréable et professionnel. Les viennoiseries sont excellentes, je recommande cette boulangerie.
reviews.name: Marion Cdl

reviews.textTranslated: Excellent pastries in this tea room 🥐 and the welcome is really warm 🙂
reviews.text: Très bonnes pâtisseries dans ce salon de thé 🥐 et en plus l’accueil est vraiment chaleureux 🙂
reviews.name: Léa Xavier

reviews.text:
Amazing place. Coffee was just amazing. And try pearl cake, you won't be disappointed)))
Also the stuff is very kind and friendly (and also they speak English)) )
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Many thanks for this lovely note. We are happy that you had a delicious time at Aimé Pouly! See you soon !
The Aimé Pouly team.
reviews.name: David Hovsepyan

reviews.text: A very friendly team (who kindly allow me to meet my French teacher and have my weekly lesson in their dining room!) Thank you!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,

Thank you so much for your lovely message! We are delighted to hear that our team could make your visits enjoyable and provide a comfortable space for your weekly lessons.

Your kind words have been shared with the team, who will be very happy to know their efforts are appreciated. We look forward to welcoming you again soon!

The Aimé Pouly Team
reviews.name: John Divver

reviews.text:
Service quality varies greatly - depending on who is working.
Atmosphere greatly invluenced by music playing - horrible if so loud tha a conversation is difficult.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,
Thank you so much for this great rating! See you soon.
The Aimé Team.
reviews.name: Jochen Koester

reviews.text: Very good pastries and nice seating area.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Goodafternoon,

Thank you for your kind feedback. We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed our pastries and found our seating area inviting.

Your satisfaction is important to us, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon to try more of our offerings.

Best regards,
Aimé Pouly team
reviews.name: F A

reviews.text:
really gentle and incredible wide choice in salty and sweety !
must taste it..
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,

Thank you so much for your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the variety of our sweet and savory products.

Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we look forward to welcoming you again soon for another delicious experience!

The Aimé Pouly Team
reviews.name: Juan Mir

reviews.text: I'm a local and a regular. At least once a day I go there for coffee and croissant. Excellent, quiet and friendly team. The place is very close to the Geneva fountain and therefore a bit busy on sunny days. Great and quiet space inside to talk and rest. Kudos to the team!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
A big THANK YOU for your positive feedback !
We are very happy to hear that you had a good time during your last visit !
Thank you again and we are looking forward to seeing you soon in our bakeries.
Your Aimé Pouly team.
reviews.name: Eva Ferrero

reviews.text: Servers are very kind and quick to help. Very tourist friendly, and a great place to relax and re-caffeinate. The quiches are delicious and coffees exceptional. Can't recommend enough!!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,
Thank you so much for your kind words! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your experience, from the service to the quiches and coffee. Your recommendation means a lot to us, and we hope to welcome you back soon.
The Aimé Team.
reviews.name: Noah Thomas

reviews.text: Really good coffee and pastries, had breakfast here a couple of times. Some of the staff didn't speak English on my 2nd visit (which seemed rare in Geneva) but were helpful and got my order done correctly.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,
Many thanks for this lovely note. We are happy that you had a delicious time at Aimé! See you soon !
The Aimé team.
reviews.name: Gopi C

reviews.text: after remodelation, the place is really nice and well distributed, it is not cheap but you got the quality that you paid for... almost a must stop on our way to the lake!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Good afternoon,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback! We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the recent renovations and found the space both nice and well-organized. We strive to provide quality in all aspects, and your acknowledgment of this is greatly appreciated.

We look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to the lake!

Best regards,
Aimé Pouly team
reviews.name: Pedro H. Colombo

reviews.text: Great choices from the in-house bakery, a selection of quiches, croissants and sweets, friendly staff.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
A big THANK YOU for your positive feedback !
We are very happy to hear that you had a good time during your last visit !
Thank you again and we are looking forward to seeing you soon in our bakeries.
Your Aimé Pouly team.
reviews.name: Alex Marinov

reviews.text: Stopped here while waiting for a train. Staff is lovely and welcoming, coffee is nice, area is quiet and locals regularly stop by.
reviews.name: Martin Hallan

reviews.text: A cosy Portuguese cafe and boulangerie with wonderful croissants and good coffee
reviews.name: R O

reviews.text: Best home baked cakes and the friendliest owners :) strongly recommend their pound cakes! Original and unique recipes full of flavor and comfort :D
reviews.name: Eun Sun Lee

reviews.text: cute little spot — owners are super sweet and the desserts are delicious!
reviews.name: Katya Slozina

reviews.text: Cosy tiny café
reviews.name: Ralf Handl

reviews.textTranslated:
We were here on a Sunday. It was great that the bakery was open.

The baked goods were delicious. The prices are very reasonable for Geneva, and the staff were super friendly!
reviews.text:
Wir waren an einem Sonntag hier. Toll, dass der Bäcker geöffnet hatte.

Sehr leckere Backwaren. Die Preise sind für Genf sehr okay und die Mitarbeiter waren super freundlich!
reviews.name: CU B (CUB)

reviews.textTranslated:
A place as warm and welcoming as visiting family.

The sandwiches are made to order and taste fantastic.

I had the Bifana, Omelette, and Merveille: Bifana 5/5, Omelette 5/5, Merveille 10/10!!!
reviews.text:
Ein Ort, so herzlich und willkommend, wie bei Verwandten.

Die Sandwiches werden auf Bestellung gemacht und schmecken hervorragend.

Ich hatte Bifana, Omelette und Merveille: Bifana 5/5, Omelette 5/5, Merveille 10/10!!!
reviews.name: SevenSoul433

reviews.textTranslated: Absolutely fantastic! 👍 The lady was kind and helpful. Everything was excellent. The establishment was clean.
reviews.text: Au top 👍. Dame gentille et serviable. Tout est excellent. Établissement propre.
reviews.name: Alexandra B

reviews.textTranslated:
Coffee and croissants for everyone.
Terrace and indoor dining.
Well-maintained.
reviews.text:
Cafés et croissants à plusieurs.
Terrasse et salle intérieure.
Bien tenu.
reviews.name: francois subiger

reviews.textTranslated: The coffee is very good. At La Merveille SARL, the decor is very nice. At La Merveille SARL, the Swiss gin, it's me, Adrian, Willy Bridge. I came back with my mother. I've been here at La Merveille SARL this afternoon. It was October 12, 2023. For me, Adrian, the senior waitress is very friendly and generous.
reviews.text: El café está muy rico A la merveille SARL la decoración es muy bonita A la merveille SARL dé ginebra suiza soy yo Adrián puente Willy volver con mi madre estado aquí en la merveille SARL está tarde para eso él 12 de octubre 2023 para mí Adrián la seniora y camarera es muy simpática y generosa
reviews.name: Adrián Puente Willy

title: Salon de thé La Brioche Dorée

reviews.name: Patrick Macho
reviews.text: Prix prohibitifs. Service inexistant. Aucune originalité dans les produits. Arcade montée à l'emporte pièce, sans âme.
reviews.textTranslated: Exorbitant prices. Non-existent service. No originality in the products. A hastily assembled, soulless arcade.

reviews.name: David Iglesias
reviews.text: Même pour Genève les prix sont trop élevés. Et ce n'est pas peu dire.
reviews.textTranslated: Even for Geneva, the prices are too high. And that's saying something.

reviews.textTranslated: Excellent fresh fruit juice!!! The waitress was lovely, smiling, and very helpful, even on a Sunday morning at 8 am! 👏
reviews.text: Jus de fruits frais excellents !!! Serveuse adorable souriante et très serviable même le dimanche matin à 8h ! 👏
reviews.name: Nath Franck 2020

reviews.textTranslated: I stopped by the Carl-Vogt 92 store and I must say I was absolutely delighted! The service was impeccable, the croissants were perfectly baked 👍, and when I asked about the new products, the lady was very helpful. I'll be taking the opportunity to order a magnificent Black Forest cake for my son's birthday. I highly recommend this store! The others, excuse me, are much better, but they don't compare. Thank you, Madam from 92!
reviews.text: Je suis passé au magasin de Carl-Vogt 92 et je dois dire que j'ai été ravi au plus haut point ! Le service était impeccable, la cuisson des croissants 👍et lorsque j'ai demandé des informations sur les nouveaux produits, la dame m'a gentiment informé. J'en profiterai pour passé commande d'une magnifique forêt noire pour l'anniversaire de mon fils. Je ne peux que recommander ce magasin-là ! Les autres, excusez-moi, étant beaucoup agréables, sans comparaison.  Merci Madame du 92 !
reviews.name: Perrier Frédéric

reviews.text: Best smoked salmon pretzel ever had! Service was quick and friendly
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,

Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our smoked salmon pretzel and that the service was up to your expectations. We look forward to welcoming you back for more delicious treats!

See you soon,
The Aimé Pouly Team
reviews.name: N . S

reviews.text: Lovely and  friendly local bakery with very kind service. Some delicious tartes and breads - and good salty snacks and salads too!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Many thanks for this lovely note. We are happy that you had a delicious time at Aimé Pouly! See you soon ! The Aimé Pouly team.
reviews.name: DC Cymbalista

reviews.text: Good pastries, cookies, etc.  and good coffee.  Nice location in Champel.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Hello,

Thank you so much for your feedback! We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our pastries and coffee, as well as our location in Champel. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we are happy to know that you had a pleasant experience with us.

We hope to welcome you back very soon for more delicious experiences!

Sincerely,
The Aimé Pouly Team
reviews.name: Louis Rodriques

reviews.text: Delicious (as always with Pouly), but this branch in particular has a super nice server, so that is a huge plus

Thank you again and we are looking forward to seeing you soon in our bakeries.
Your Aimé Pouly team.
